Imports

../Typos/chat_messages, ../Typos/common, ../Typos/provider_config, ../Typos/tools

Types

TyposResponseStream = ref object
  stream*: OpenAIResponseStream
  messageStream*: OpenAIStream
  hasEmittedDelta*: bool
  bufferedResponse*: string
  emittedBuffered*: bool
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc getNextChunk(stream: TyposResponseStream): Option[string] {.
    ...raises: [KeyError], tags: [ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Get the next text chunk from the streaming response. Source   Edit   
proc initClient(config: ProviderConfig) {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, ResourceExhaustedError], tags: [ReadEnvEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Initialize the OpenAI-compatible client for the configured provider. Source   Edit   
proc sendMessage(chatMessages: seq[ChatMessage]): TyposResponseStream {....raises: [
    ValueError, ResourceExhaustedError, JsonError, CatchableError, OpenAiError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Start a streaming request for the current chat history. Source   Edit   
proc sendMessageWithReadTools(chatMessages: seq[ChatMessage]): TyposResponseStream {....raises: [
    ValueError, ResourceExhaustedError, KeyError, ZippyError, CatchableError,
    OpenAiError, JsonError, Exception, IOError, OSError, JsonParsingError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, RootEffect, TimeEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Run a request with read-only tools and return buffered text output. Source   Edit   
proc sendMessageWithReadWriteTools(chatMessages: seq[ChatMessage]): TyposResponseStream {....raises: [
    ValueError, ResourceExhaustedError, KeyError, ZippyError, CatchableError,
    OpenAiError, JsonError, Exception, IOError, OSError, JsonParsingError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, RootEffect, TimeEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Run a request with read+write tools and return buffered text output. Source   Edit   
proc sendMessageWithTools(chatMessages: seq[ChatMessage];
                          tools: ResponseToolsTable): TyposResponseStream {....raises: [
    ValueError, ResourceExhaustedError, KeyError, ZippyError, CatchableError,
    OpenAiError, JsonError, Exception, IOError, OSError, JsonParsingError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, RootEffect, TimeEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect],
    forbids: [].}
Run a request with a pre-built tool table and return buffered text output. Source   Edit
